# CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Value

**Enumeration**

An enumeration of attachment values.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Value
```

## Cases

- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Value.shouldPropagate(_:)**: A case that indicates to propagate a value.
- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Value.shouldNotPropagate(_:)**: A case that indicates to not propagate a value.

## Properties

- **value**: An attachment value.
- **mode**: An attachment mode.

## Accessing Attachments

- **subscript(_:)**: Gets the value associated with the specified attachment.
- **subscript(_:)**: Gets the value associated with the specified attachment key.

items.description: A case that indicates to propagate a value.

items.description: A case that indicates to not propagate a value.
